landing.title: Fresh meat, delivered in 60 minutes
landing.subtitle: From verified local vendors directly to your door.
pwa.title: Use Chicken Chauk like an app
pwa.body.withPrompt: Install for quick access and a full-screen experience — no app store required.
pwa.body.ios: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen” to add Chicken Chauk to your Home Screen (works on iPhone and iPad).
pwa.body.android: Tap ⋮ (menu) in your browser, then choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
pwa.body.desktop: Use the install icon in your browser’s address bar, or the browser menu → Install Chicken Chauk.
splash.tagline: Fresh meat, delivered fast — from verified local vendors.
